title: T-023 — Local search refinement (swap pairs, move between lines)
prompt:
# T-023 — Local search refinement (swap pairs, move between lines)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §6 D1, §10.1 local_search_iterations=200, threshold 2%
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement N-iteration local search refinement in `services/planner-solver/app/algorithms/local_search.py` accepting random-pair swaps + between-line moves if total_cost decreases ≥ acceptance_threshold_pct (default 2.0).

## Implementation contract
1. New module `services/planner-solver/app/algorithms/local_search.py` exporting `def refine(assignments, cost_fn, iterations=200, threshold_pct=2.0) -> list[Assignment]`.
2. Each iteration: pick two random assignments, propose either (a) swap order on same line, or (b) move one to another line at same time slot; compute cost_fn(new); accept if reduction ≥ threshold_pct of current.
3. Maintain best-cost found; final return = best, not last iteration.
4. Deterministic when seed provided (testability).

## Files
- services/planner-solver/app/algorithms/local_search.py [create]
- services/planner-solver/tests/test_local_search.py [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given baseline assignments with cost C0 + a refinement that strictly reduces cost, when refine runs, then returned assignments have cost ≤ C0
2. Given seed=42 + identical inputs, when refine runs twice, then result is identical (deterministic)
3. Given 200 iterations + a no-improvement scenario, when refine runs, then it returns the original assignments (best-of-found = baseline)

## Test strategy
- RED: write services/planner-solver/tests/test_local_search.py asserting non-worsening + determinism with seed + 200-iter cap
- Run 'cd services/planner-solver && uv run pytest tests/test_local_search.py'

## Risk red lines
- Do not accept worsening swaps (must reduce cost ≥ threshold)
- Do not violate hard constraints during swap (V-SCHED-02/03/04 must still hold)
- Do not exceed iteration cap (algorithm must terminate)
